title: Asiong Salonga
actors: Joseph Estrada, Jose Padilla Jr., Yolanda Guevarra
plot: In the late 1940s and early 1950s, the name Asiong Salonga brought fear and chills to the residents of Tondo and its environs. Dreaded, notorious gang leader Salonga and the likes of Totoy Golem, Toothpick, Boy Zapanta, and other ...
